---
title: "Victorian Half-Century: A Jubilee Book, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe,’ ‘Unknown to History,’ etc.."
---

## Victorian Half-Century: A Jubilee Book, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe,’ ‘Unknown to History,’ etc..

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1886
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company

### Notes

The preface is dated December 1886.  This is a historical survey of Queen Victoria’s reign.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
